if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND h.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND h.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdhProdStatusHist :: selectById */ h.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , usr.user_nm AS proc_user_nm , cd_ps.code_label AS before_status_cd_nm FROM pdh_prod_status_hist h LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = h.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = h.proc_user_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ps ON cd_ps.code_grp = 'PRODUCT_STATUS' AND cd_ps.code_value = h.before_status_cd WHERE h.prod_status_hist_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdhProdStatusHist :: selectList */ h.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , usr.user_nm AS proc_user_nm , cd_ps.code_label AS before_status_cd_nm FROM pdh_prod_status_hist h LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = h.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = h.proc_user_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ps ON cd_ps.code_grp = 'PRODUCT_STATUS' AND cd_ps.code_value = h.before_status_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdhProdStatusHist :: selectPageList */ h.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , usr.user_nm AS proc_user_nm , cd_ps.code_label AS before_status_cd_nm FROM pdh_prod_status_hist h LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = h.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = h.proc_user_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ps ON cd_ps.code_grp = 'PRODUCT_STATUS' AND cd_ps.code_value = h.before_status_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(h.*) /* base.ec.pd :: PdhProdStatusHist :: selectPageCount */ FROM pdh_prod_status_hist h
